designBrief.silhouette: angled missile pods / flak array plus a visible radar element
requiredComponents: upward-angled missile pods or flak barrels
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction anti-air platform in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: single forward cannon (reads as tank). Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting a segment of a sci-fi vehicle hull, suitable for a red anti-air platform. The material is heavily rolled battle steel, scorched and scarred from intense combat, featuring a gunmetal base tone with sharp crimson and molten orange emissive accent strips tracing intricate alien energy conduits and pulsating vents. Detail includes layered plating secured by alien-tech rivets, strange bioluminescent glyphs etched into the surface, and subtle patterns suggestive of organic-mechanical fusion, all rendered without perspective, baked lighting, or text.

Generate a seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet for a sci-fi anti-air platform hull. The surface showcases robust riveted armor plates of dark gunmetal rolled battle steel, bearing heavy scorch marks and industrial wear. Vivid crimson and electric orange emissive strips weave through the plating, illuminating alien geometric patterns and strange, interlocking conduits that resemble exotic energy containment fields. The texture is completely flat, orthographic, with no perspective distortions, no baked lighting, and devoid of any text, emphasizing its raw, functional, alien industrial aesthetic.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
